arts.ttl: Ter Stegen posts positive update as Barca stopper inches closer to comeback
arts.sum: Barcelona goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen has posted a positive injury update as he continues on the road to recovery. Ter Stegen has now revealed that he’s back working with the ball on the training pitch in another positive development for the stopper.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star’s agent arrives in the city ahead of Rayo clash

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s predicted XI to face Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: An insight into the XI of players expected to be fielded by Barcelona in the club’s upcoming meeting with Rayo Vallecano has on Sunday been provided. Barca, of course, are…

arts.ttl: What to look out for as Barca face Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: Barcelona play on a Monday for the first time this season when they take on Rayo Vallecano and do generally fare pretty well at the start of the week. The last time Barcelona played on a Monday was at the end of last season when they ran out 2-0 winners against Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Ronald Araujo not risked as Barcelona face Rayo Vallecano test
arts.sum: Barcelona will be looking to strike a blow in the La Liga title race as they play host to in-form Rayo Vallecano tomorrow. La Blaugrana are currently third in the table, but they have a real chance to make up ground, after weekend draws for Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid.
